blocked_claims.reason: No named Security/Legal reviewer and no tool scope proof.
Retention, logging, deletion, and channel/repository boundaries are not proven.

blocked_claims.claim: The agent may create or mutate Jira/GitHub/Slack state.
blocked_claims.reason: Write actions require rollback/off-switch proof and explicit human approval.
Compliance approval cannot be inferred from an agent request or demo transcript.

missing_proof.item: GitHub repository allowlist and permission level
Slack channel allowlist, retention policy, and customer-data boundary
Jira project scope, draft-only mode, and rollback/off-switch plan
Support escalation workflow and human handoff owner
Audit log shape for tool calls, evidence intake, and reviewer decisions

next_human_action: Run a scoped dry-run pilot review with named repositories, channels, and Jira project.

reviewer_owners.review_area: customer-data exposure, retention, logging, policy boundary
permission boundaries, rollback, off-switch, audit logs
workflow fit, escalation rules, human handoff
paid tool/vendor spend if live actions or seats are enabled
